title: Stage handoff state.json
description: Per-stage handoff record written by the Hermes worker at every stage boundary. Source of truth: docs/agentic-workflow/10-orchestration-and-filesystem.md. May record file paths, counts, endpoint IDs, timing, and terminal error summaries. Must NOT contain API keys, cookies, hidden envelope derivation notes, or full private source-bearing artifacts.

schema_version.description: Pin the schema version; bump on breaking shape changes.

run_id.description: ISO timestamp with optional suffix; matches the runs/<run_id>/ directory name.

model_endpoints.description: Endpoint role names from config/llm-endpoints.yaml (e.g. extractor, council_decider).

tool_manifest.description: Stage key from config/tools.yaml that lists the tools this stage may call.

metrics.description: Counters relevant to this stage (sources_processed, claims_emitted, provider_calls, retries, etc.).

error.description: Terminal error summary on failure; null otherwise. Must not include keys, tokens, or full private artifacts.
